code:
#Requires AutoHotkey v2.1-alpha.17
#SingleInstance Force

ClipboardEditor()

class ClipboardEditor {
    static Title := "Clipboard Editor"

    static Transforms := Map(
        "UPPERCASE", StrUpper,
        "lowercase", StrLower,
        "Title Case", StrTitle
    )

    Text {
        get => this.edit.Value
        set => this.edit.Value := value
    }

    __New() {
        this.buttons := []
        this.gui := Gui("+Resize +MinSize500x340", ClipboardEditor.Title)
        this.gui.SetFont("s10 cWhite", "Segoe UI")
        this.gui.MarginX := 10
        this.gui.MarginY := 10
        this.gui.BackColor := 0x202020
        this.edit := this.gui.AddEdit("xm w480 h250 Multi VScroll Background252526 cE6E6E6")
        DllCall("uxtheme\SetWindowTheme", "ptr", this.edit.Hwnd, "str", "DarkMode_Explorer", "ptr", 0)
        for label, fn in ClipboardE ditor.Transforms
            this.AddDarkButton(label, this.Apply.Bind(this, fn), A_Index = 1 ? "xm" : "x+10")
        this.saveBtn := this.AddDarkButton("Save to Clipboard", this.Save.Bind(this), "x+10")
        DllCall("dwmapi\DwmSetWindowAttribute", "ptr", this.gui.Hwnd, "int", 20, "int*", true, "int", 4)
        this.gui.OnEvent("Close", (*) => ExitApp())
        this.gui.OnEvent("Escape", (*) => ExitApp())
        this.gui.OnEvent("Size", this.OnSize.Bind(this))
        this.Text := A_Clipboard
        this.gui.Show("w500 h340")
        this.edit.Focus()
    }

    AddDarkButton(text, callback, pos) {
        btn := this.gui.AddButton(pos " w110 h30 Background333334", text)
        btn.OnEvent("Click", callback)
        DllCall("uxtheme\SetWindowTheme", "ptr", btn.Hwnd, "str", "DarkMode_Explorer", "ptr", 0)
        this.buttons.Push(btn)
        return btn
    }

    Apply(fn, *) => this.Text := fn(this.Text)

    Save(*) {
        A_Clipboard := this.Text
        this.Flash("saved to clipboard")
    }

    Flash(msg) {
        this.gui.Title := ClipboardEditor.Title " — " msg
        SetTimer((*) => this.gui.Title := ClipboardEditor.Title, -1200)
    }

    OnSize(guiObj, minMax, width, height) {
        static pad := 10, gap := 10, btnH := 30
        if minMax = -1
            return
        this.edit.Move(pad, pad, width - pad * 2, height - pad * 3 - btnH)
        btnY := height - pad - btnH
        btnW := (width - pad * 2 - gap * (this.buttons.Length - 1)) // this.buttons.Length
        x := pad
        for btn in this.buttons {
            w := A_Index = this.buttons.Length ? width - pad - x : btnW
            btn.Move(x, btnY, w, btnH)
            x += w + gap
        }
        DllCall("InvalidateRect", "ptr", guiObj.Hwnd, "ptr", 0, "int", true)
    }
}

code:
#Requires AutoHotkey v2.1-alpha.16
#SingleInstance Force

ClipboardEditor()

class ClipboardEditor {
    __New() {
        this.gui := Gui("+Resize +MinSize500x368", "Clipboard Editor")
        this.gui.SetFont("s10", "Segoe UI")
        this.editor := this.gui.AddEdit("x10 y10 w480 h260 Multi WantTab VScroll", A_Clipboard)
        this.transforms := Map()
        this.transforms["UPPERCASE"] := StrUpper
        this.transforms["lowercase"] := StrLower
        this.transforms["Title Case"] := StrTitle
        xPos := 10
        for label, fn in this.transforms {
            btn := this.gui.AddButton("x" xPos " y280 w153 h32", label)
            btn.OnEvent("Click", this.Apply.Bind(this, fn))
            xPos += 163
        }
        this.saveBtn := this.gui.AddButton("x10 y322 w479 h34 Default", "Save to Clipboard")
        this.saveBtn.OnEvent("Click", this.Save.Bind(this))
        this.gui.OnEvent("Close", this.Close.Bind(this))
        this.gui.OnEvent("Escape", this.Close.Bind(this))
        this.gui.Show("w500 h368")
    }

    Apply(fn, *) => this.editor.Value := fn(this.editor.Value)

    Save(*) {
        A_Clipboard := this.editor.Value
        ToolTip("Saved to clipboard")
        SetTimer(() => ToolTip(), -1200)
    }

    Close(*) {
        this.gui.Destroy()
        ExitApp()
    }
}

#Requires AutoHotkey v2.1-alpha.16
#SingleInstance Force

myGui := ClipboardEditor()

class ControlWrapper {
    ctrl := ""
    __New(ctrl) {
        this.ctrl := ctrl
    }

    Value {
        get => this.ctrl.Value
        set => this.ctrl.Value := value
    }

    Move(x, y, w, h) => this.ctrl.Move(x, y, w, h)
    OnEvent(event, callback) => this.ctrl.OnEvent(event, callback)
}

class EditWrap extends ControlWrapper {
    Length => StrLen(this.Value)
    LineCount {
        get {
            text := this.Value
            if StrLen(text) = 0
                return 0
            return StrSplit(RegExReplace(text, "\R", "`n"), "`n").Length
        }
    }
}

class ButtonWrap extends ControlWrapper {
    Value {
        get => this.ctrl.Text
        set => this.ctrl.Text := value
    }
}

class ClipboardEditor {

    gui := ""
    edit := ""
    btnUpper := ""
    btnLower := ""
    btnFormat := ""
    status := ""

    __New() {
        this.gui := Gui("+Resize +DPIScale")
        this.gui.Title := "Clipboard Text Transformer"
        editCtrl := this.gui.Add("Edit", "x10 y10 w680 h380 +Multi +VScroll +WantReturn")
        this.edit := EditWrap(editCtrl)
        btnUCtrl := this.gui.Add("Button", "x10 y400 w180 h30", "UPPERCASE")
        this.btnUpper := ButtonWrap(btnUCtrl)
        btnLCtrl := this.gui.Add("Button", "x200 y400 w180 h30", "lowercase")
        this.btnLower := ButtonWrap(btnLCtrl)
        btnFCtrl := this.gui.Add("Button", "x390 y400 w180 h30", "Format")
        this.btnFormat := ButtonWrap(btnFCtrl)
        statusCtrl := this.gui.Add("Text", "x10 y440 w680 h20", "Characters: 0   Lines: 0")
        this.status := ControlWrapper(statusCtrl)
        this.edit.OnEvent("Change", this.UpdateStatus.Bind(this))
        this.btnUpper.OnEvent("Click", this.ToUpper.Bind(this))
        this.btnLower.OnEvent("Click", this.ToLower.Bind(this))
        this.btnFormat.OnEvent("Click", this.ToFormat.Bind(this))
        this.gui.OnEvent("Size", this.OnResize.Bind(this))
        this.LoadFromClipboard()
        this.UpdateStatus()
        this.gui.Show("w700 h480")
    }

    LoadFromClipboard() {
        text := ""
        try text := A_Clipboard
        catch text := ""
        if Type(text) != "String"
            text := ""
        this.edit.Value := text
    }

    UpdateStatus() {
        text := this.edit.Value
        charCount := StrLen(text)
        lines := text ? StrSplit(RegExReplace(text, "\R", "`n"), "`n").Length : 0
        this.status.Value := "Characters: " charCount "   Lines: " lines
    }

    ToUpper() {
        this.ApplyTransform(StrUpper(this.edit.Value))
    }

    ToLower() {
        this.ApplyTransform(StrLower(this.edit.Value))
    }

    ToFormat() {
        this.ApplyTransform(this.FormatText(this.edit.Value))
    }

    ApplyTransform(newText) {
        this.edit.Value := newText
        A_Clipboard := newText
        this.UpdateStatus()
    }

    FormatText(text) {
        if StrLen(text) = 0
            return "`r`n"
        normalized := RegExReplace(text, "\R", "`r`n")
        spaced := StrReplace(normalized, "`t", "    ")
        lines := StrSplit(spaced, "`r`n")
        for i, line in lines
            lines[i] := RTrim(line)
        result := ""
        for line in lines
            result .= line "`r`n"
        return result
    }

    OnResize(_, _, _, width, height) {
        if width < 200 || height < 200
            return
        margin := 10
        buttonY := height - 80
        btnW := 180
        btnH := 30
        gap := 20
        totalW := btnW * 3 + gap * 2
        startX := (width - totalW) // 2
        editH := height - 130
        this.edit.Move(margin, margin, width - margin * 2, editH)
        this.btnUpper.Move(startX, buttonY, btnW, btnH)
        this.btnLower.Move(startX + btnW + gap, buttonY, btnW, btnH)
        this.btnFormat.Move(startX + (btnW + gap) * 2, buttonY, btnW, btnH)
        statusY := buttonY + btnH + 10
        this.status.Move(margin, statusY, width - margin * 2, 25)
    }
}

        this.gui := Gui("+Resize +MinSize640x480", "✨ Clipboard Text Editor")
        this.gui.BackColor := "0x1e1e1e"
        
        ; Create centered, resizable layout
        this.gui.OnEvent("Size", this.ResizeGUI.Bind(this))
        
        ; Create our 4 main controls: 3 buttons + 1 edit box
        this.CreateControls()
        
        ; Add beautiful visual enhancements
        this.ApplyStyling()
    }
    
    ; Initialize all GUI controls with proper positioning
    CreateControls() {
        ; Large, multi-line edit box for text editing
        this.editBox := this.gui.AddEdit("vUserText Wrap -WantReturn", "")
        this.editBox.Opt("+ReadOnly")
        this.editBox.Opt("+WantReturn")
        
        ; Text transformation buttons with emoji styling  
        this.btnUpper := this.gui.AddButton("Section", "🔤 UPPERCASE")
        this.btnLower := this.gui.AddButton("", "🔡 lowercase") 
        this.btnFormat := this.gui.AddButton("", "🎨 Format Text")
        
        ; Attach click handlers with .Bind(this) as required
        this.btnUpper.OnEvent("Click", this.UpperCase.Bind(this))
        this.btnLower.OnEvent("Click", this.LowerCase.Bind(this))  
        this.btnFormat.OnEvent("Click", this.FormatText.Bind(this))
        
        ; Create keyboard shortcuts as beautiful shortcuts
        this.CreateShortcuts()
    }
    
    ; Add beautiful visual enhancements  
    ApplyStyling() {
        ; Define our elegant color scheme
        colors := Map(
            "bg", "0x1e1e1e",
            "text", "0xd4d4d4", 
            "accent", "0x569cd6"
        )
        
        ; Style our GUI with modern appearance
        this.gui.SetFont("s12", "Cascade") 
        this.gui.SetFont("s11", colors["text"])
        
        ; Create beautiful button layout with proper spacing
        this.LayoutControls()
        
        ; Add resizing support
        this.gui.OnEvent("Close", this.ExitApp.Bind(this))
    }
    
    ; Load current clipboard content into our edit box
    LoadClip() {
        ; Pull current clipboard contents
        clip := A_Clipboard
        
        ; Skip loading for empty clipboards
        if (clip == "") {
            clip := "Clipboard is currently empty. Type here to edit, then save with Ctrl+S"
            this.SetText(clip)
            return
        }
        
        ; Load and display the clipboard text
        this.SetText(clip)
    }
    
    ; Set text in our edit control
    SetText(text) {
        ; Replace edit box content with transformed version
        this.editBox.Text := text
        this.originalText := text
    }
    
    ; Replace text content safely
    SafeSetText(newText) {
        ; Store reference to current text before transformation  
        this.SetText(newText)
    }
    
    ; Convert text to uppercase
    UpperCase() {
        ; Get current content, transform to uppercase, update GUI
        newText := Format("{:U}", this.editBox.Text)
        this.SetText(newText)
    }
    
    ; Convert text to lowercase  
    LowerCase() {
        ; Change text to all lowercase
        newText := Format("{:L}", this.editBox.Text)
        this.SetText(newText)
    }
    
    ; Apply basic text formatting improvements
    FormatText() {
        ; Apply multiple formatting rules in sequence
        text := this.editBox.Text
        
        ; Fix common spacing issues
        text := RegExReplace(text, "([^\s])\s+", "$1 ")  ; Remove extra spaces
        text := RegExReplace(text, "\r\n\r\n", "`r`n")    ; Normalize line breaks
        
        ; Make punctuation spacing consistent
        text := RegExReplace(text, "\s*([.,!?:;])\s*", " $1 ")
        text := RegExReplace(text, " +", " ")                 ; Collapse extra spaces
        
        ; Present the improved version to the user
        this.SetText(text)
    }
    
    ; Save current text back to system clipboard
    SaveToClipboard() {
        ; Copy our new content to the system clipboard  
        A_Clipboard := this.editBox.Text
        
        ; Confirm save with subtle animation
        this.animateButton(this.btnSave)
        this.ShowStatus("✨ Text saved to clipboard!")
    }
    
    ; Show GUI to user with initial state
    ShowGUI() {
        ; Initialize our GUI if not yet created
        if (!this.gui) 
            this.CreateGUI()
        
        ; Display window to user
        this.gui.Show("w800 h600 Center AutoSize")
    }
    
    ; Position our controls properly  
    ResizeGUI(w, h) {
        ; Handle window resizing gracefully  
        margin := 20
        
        ; Update layout when window changes size
        this.editBox.Move(margin, margin, w - (2 * margin), h - 120)
        
        ; Maintain button layout during resize
        this.btnUpper.Move(margin, h - 90, (w - 2*margin) / 3 - 5) 
        this.btnLower.Move(margin + (w/3) + 2.5, h - 90, (w - 2*margin)/3 - 5)
        this.btnFormat.Move((2*w/3) + 2.5, h - 90, (w - 2*margin)/3 - 5)        
    }
    
    ; Add keyboard shortcuts
    CreateShortcuts() {
        ; Setup Ctrl+S for saving
        try {
            Hotkey("^s", this.SaveToClipboard.Bind(this))
        } catch {}
    }
    
    ; Clean up when closing
    ExitApp() {
        ExitApp()  
    }
}
